overview: Venn Integrative Medicine delivers personalized metabolic health and hormone balance care through comprehensive assessments, hormone optimization treatments, and medical weight loss programs. Services are provided by Lindsay Venn, PA-C, RD via telemedicine and in-person consultations in Ammon, Idaho.
highlights: Functional lab testing with personalized treatment plans
Specialized 90-Day Metabolic Course partnered with Insulin IQ
targetAudience: Individuals with metabolic dysfunction, hormone imbalances, and weight loss goals, particularly women navigating menopause and men seeking to optimize testosterone and reverse chronic disease.
